title: Differential equations
summary: 9709 P3 differential equations — separable and linear first-order equations, slope fields, and modelling with GeoGebra.
learningObjectives: Use integrating factors for linear first-order equations.
Interpret slope fields and particular solutions.
Apply DEs to growth and decay models.

simpleExplanation.title: Equations with derivatives
simpleExplanation.summary: A differential equation links a function with its derivatives. Initial conditions pick one solution curve from the family.
steps: Linear: dy/dx + Py = Q → multiply by e^∫P dx.
Slope field: short segments show dy/dx at grid points.

sections.content: **Differential equations** (3.8) often carry **6–8 marks** on P3. State the **general solution** then apply the **initial condition** for the particular solution.
